summary: CRM migration executed successfully with findings on internal team data location. Tasks completed: (1) Backup created at N5/data/crm_backup_20260201.db, (2) CRM copied to canonical location N5/data/crm.db, (3) is_internal column added to individuals table. Key finding: Internal team members (Vrijen, Logan, Ilse, Shivam, Ankit) are stored in N5/data/profiles.db, NOT in the legacy CRM. The CRM only contains 57 external contacts. Successfully flagged 3 internal team members in CRM (Logan Currie, Ilse Funkhouser, Shivam Desai) who had external-facing entries. Vrijen (Attawar V, Vrijen Attawar) and Ankit Mittal do not have entries in the CRM - they exist only in profiles.db. Recommendation: Either (a) add internal team to CRM for unified SSOT, or (b) use profiles system as internal team source of truth and CRM for external contacts only.
